title: Add Tasks
description: Add TripAdvisor place URLs as tasks to scrape reviews from hotels, restaurants, and attractions

content.introduction: Add TripAdvisor place URLs to your squid for scraping reviews. The scraper extracts comprehensive review data including ratings, review text, user information, travel dates, photos, subratings, owner responses, and more from hotels, restaurants, and attractions on TripAdvisor.

taskFormat.title: Task Format
taskFormat.content: Each task should contain a URL from a TripAdvisor place page. You can scrape reviews from hotels, restaurants, or attractions.

rows.description: TripAdvisor place URL (hotel, restaurant, or attraction review page)

supportedUrls.title: Supported URL Formats
supportedUrls.content: The scraper supports TripAdvisor review URLs from various regional domains:
list: Supported TLDs: .com, .fr, .co.uk, .de, .es, .it, .ca, .in, .jp, and other regional domains

proTips.content: Use the scraper's filter settings (language, rating, hours_back) to collect only the reviews you need and reduce credit consumption.
Each place type (hotel, restaurant, attraction) has its own URL format on TripAdvisor. Make sure to use the review page URL, not the overview page.

seo.title: Add Tasks - TripAdvisor Reviews Scraper - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add TripAdvisor place URLs as tasks for scraping reviews from hotels, restaurants, and attractions with comprehensive review data.
